message:
fix: rewrite TestShow to use in-process execution (bd-g5py2)

TestShow was broken after Dolt transition: it built the bd binary via
`go build` (~70s CGO link time) then ran subprocess init+create which
failed with "issue_prefix config is missing". Rewrote to use the
in-process test pattern from cli_fast_test.go (setupCLITestDB +
runBDInProcess), eliminating both the binary build overhead and the
routing issue. Split into 5 focused test functions. Removed TestShow
from .test-skip since it no longer has the binary build problem.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -1,9 +1,5 @@
 # Tests to skip due to known issues
 # Format: one test name per line (regex patterns supported)
 
-# TestShow: builds bd binary via `go build` inside test (~70s CGO link time).
-# Subtests also fail with "database not initialized" after init (routing issue).
-TestShow
-
 # TestRepairMultiplePrefixes: test itself skips on Dolt backend (needs rewrite for Dolt rename semantics).
 TestRepairMultiplePrefixes
